name: DynamicPageHeader
description: The collapsible header region of DynamicPage. Houses the FilterBar on List Report screens and attribute/KPI groups on Object Page screens. This slot is the structural differentiator between List Report (has DynamicPageHeader) and Worklist (has no DynamicPageHeader). Collapses when the user scrolls down; DynamicPageTitle remains visible.

props.name: pinnable
props.description: When true (default), a pin button appears allowing the user to keep the header permanently expanded. Set false to remove the pin affordance.

slots.name: content
slots.description: On List Report: contains the FilterBar. On Object Page: contains attribute groups, KPI tiles, Avatar, and ObjectStatus controls. On Worklist: this slot (and therefore this entire component) must not exist.

notes: Only valid as the header slot of sap.f.DynamicPage — never standalone.
MUST be present on list-report and analytical-list-page floorplans.
MUST NOT be present on worklist floorplan — its absence is the structural marker that distinguishes Worklist from List Report.
FilterBar must be placed inside this component's content slot — never directly in DynamicPage content slot.
On Object Page: contains KPI/attribute groups, Avatar, and ObjectStatus — not a FilterBar.

keyboard: Tab — navigate through interactive elements in the header
notes: The header expand/collapse state is announced automatically by the DynamicPage framework.
FilterBar inside this component must have an accessible label.

examples.title: List Report header with FilterBar
whenToUse: List Report screens where the user needs to filter a large open dataset
whenNotToUse: Worklist screens — there is nothing to filter, the list is pre-scoped by the system
Never add this component to a Worklist floorplan screen
